chapter_title.en: Chapter on Voluntary Fasting and Its Rewards on Different Days

text: 1803 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : «مَنْ صَامَ يَوْماً فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ كَانَ يَعْدِلُ سَنَةً يَصُومُهَا ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1803 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said:
"Whoever fasts a day in the way of Allah (swt), it is equivalent to fasting a whole year."
